summary: Reposted WOWK television news segment about trade schools. The frame shows a compound miter saw resting on a workbench at a construction site, with a brick-and-stone building behind. A lower-third reads 'NEW TRADE SCHOOL FACILITY UNDER CONSTRUCTION' with 'NITRO, WV.' The audio is a reporter describing trade schools as an option for high-school graduates.

script.scene: Compound miter saw on a workbench at a construction site; chyron 'NEW TRADE SCHOOL FACILITY UNDER CONSTRUCTION / NITRO, WV.'
